member.name: T:ZLJ.Administrative.AdministrativeDto
member.summary: 行政区域后台管理 列表页的显示模型

member.name: P:ZLJ.Administrative.AdministrativeDto.LevelText
member.summary: 获取行政区域级别本地化文本

member.name: F:ZLJ.AppConsts.DefaultPassPhrase
member.summary: Default pass phrase for SimpleStringCipher decrypt/encrypt operations

member.name: M:ZLJ.Asset.IEquipmentInfoAppService.GetEnclosureAsync(System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.param: 搜索多少米以内的数据

member.name: T:ZLJ.Auditing.AuditLogAndUser
member.summary: A helper class to store an and a object.

member.name: T:ZLJ.Auditing.Dto.GetAuditLogsInput
member.summary: 过滤查询审计日志时提供的条件输入模型

member.name: M:ZLJ.Authorization.Permissions.IPermissionAppService.GetAllPermissions
member.summary: 获取系统所有权限定义(IPermissionManager没有提供异步的，暂时用个同步的吧，以后自己加一个异步的)

member.name: M:ZLJ.Authorization.Permissions.PermissionManagerExtensions.GetPermissionsFromNamesByValidating(Abp.Authorization.IPermissionManager,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Gets all permissions by names. Throws if can not find any of the permission names.

member.name: T:ZLJ.Organizations.Dto.OrganizationUnitDto
member.summary: 查询组织单位树形列表所使用的dto模型

member.name: M:ZLJ.Organizations.IOrganizationUnitAppService.CreateAsync(ZLJ.Organizations.Dto.EditOrganizationUnitDto)
member.summary: 创建树形结构数据的节点

member.name: M:ZLJ.Organizations.IOrganizationUnitAppService.GetAllListAsync(BXJG.GeneralTree.GeneralTreeGetTreeInput)
member.summary: 获取所有数据，通常由展示的列表页面调用

member.name: M:ZLJ.Organizations.IOrganizationUnitAppService.GetTreeForSelectAsync(BXJG.GeneralTree.GeneralTreeGetForSelectInput)
member.summary: 获取简洁的树形数据，通常引用此数据的页面调用
member.param: 指定父节点，是否显示全部

member.name: M:ZLJ.Organizations.IOrganizationUnitAppService.GetNodesForSelectAsync(BXJG.GeneralTree.GeneralTreeGetForSelectInput)
member.summary: 获取指定父节点的子节点，以扁平结构返回

member.name: M:ZLJ.Organizations.IOrganizationUnitAppService.MoveAsync(ZLJ.Organizations.Dto.MoveInput)
member.summary: 移动节点，服务端将自动重新生成所有兄弟节点的code

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationXJavascript
member.summary: Used to denote the encoding necessary for files containing JavaScript source code. The alternative MIME type for this file type is text/javascript.

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.AudioL24
member.summary: 24bit Linear PCM audio at 8-48kHz, 1-N channels; Defined in RFC 3190

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationXShockwaveFlash
member.summary: Adobe Flash files for example with the extension .swf

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationOctetStream
member.summary: Arbitrary binary data.[5] Generally speaking this type identifies files that are not associated with a specific application. Contrary to past assumptions by software packages such as Apache this is not a type that should be applied to unknown files. In such a case, a server or application should not indicate a content type, as it may be incorrect, but rather, should omit the type in order to allow the recipient to guess the type.[6]

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.TextCss
member.summary: Cascading Style Sheets; Defined in RFC 2318

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.TextCmd
member.summary: commands; subtype resident in Gecko browsers like Firefox 3.5

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationXDeb
member.summary: deb (file format), a software package format used by the Debian project

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationEcmascript
member.summary: ECMAScript/JavaScript; Defined in RFC 4329 (equivalent to application/javascript but with stricter processing rules)

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationEdifact
member.summary: EDI EDIFACT data; Defined in RFC 1767

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationEdiX12
member.summary: EDI X12 data; Defined in RFC 1767

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.MessagePartial
member.summary: Email; Defined in RFC 2045 and RFC 2046

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.MessageRfc822
member.summary: Email; EML files, MIME files, MHT files, MHTML files; Defined in RFC 2045 and RFC 2046

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.TextXml
member.summary: Extensible Markup Language; Defined in RFC 3023

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ImageGif
member.summary: GIF image; Defined in RFC 2045 and RFC 2046

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ModelIges
member.summary: IGS files, IGES files; Defined in RFC 2077

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.MessageImdnXml
member.summary: IMDN Instant Message Disposition Notification; Defined in RFC 5438

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationJson
member.summary: JavaScript Object Notation JSON; Defined in RFC 4627

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationJsonPatch
member.summary: JavaScript Object Notation (JSON) Patch; Defined in RFC 6902

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ImagePjpeg
member.summary: JPEG JFIF image; Associated with Internet Explorer; Listed in ms775147(v=vs.85) - Progressive JPEG, initiated before global browser support for progressive JPEGs (Microsoft and Firefox).

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ImageJpeg
member.summary: JPEG JFIF image; Defined in RFC 2045 and RFC 2046

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.MultipartAlternative
member.summary: MIME Email; Defined in RFC 2045 and RFC 2046

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.MultipartMixed
member.summary: MIME Email; Defined in RFC 2045 and RFC 2046

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.MultipartRelated
member.summary: MIME Email; Defined in RFC 2387 and used by MHTML (HTML mail)

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.AudioMpeg
member.summary: MP3 or other MPEG audio; Defined in RFC 3003

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.VideoMpeg
member.summary: MPEG-1 video with multiplexed audio; Defined in RFC 2045 and RFC 2046

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ModelMesh
member.summary: MSH files, MESH files; Defined in RFC 2077, SILO files

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.AudioBasic
member.summary: mulaw audio at 8 kHz, 1 channel; Defined in RFC 2046

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.VideoOgg
member.summary: Ogg Theora or other video (with audio); Defined in RFC 5334

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.AudioOgg
member.summary: Ogg Vorbis, Speex, Flac and other audio; Defined in RFC 5334

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationOgg
member.summary: Ogg, a multimedia bitstream container format; Defined in RFC 5334

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationPdf
member.summary: Portable Document Format, PDF has been in use for document exchange on the Internet since 1993; Defined in RFC 3778

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ImagePng
member.summary: Portable Network Graphics; Registered,[8] Defined in RFC 2083

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.AudioVndRnRealaudio
member.summary: RealAudio; Documented in RealPlayer Customer Support Answer 2559

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationRdfXml
member.summary: Resource Description Framework; Defined by RFC 3870

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ImageSvgXml
member.summary: SVG vector image; Defined in SVG Tiny 1.2 Specification Appendix M

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ImageTiff
member.summary: Tag Image File Format (only for Baseline TIFF); Defined in RFC 3302

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.TextPlain
member.summary: Textual data; Defined in RFC 2046 and RFC 3676

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationXFontTtf
member.summary: TrueType Font No registered MIME type, but this is the most commonly used

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.AudioVorbis
member.summary: Vorbis encoded audio; Defined in RFC 5215

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ApplicationFontWoff
member.summary: Web Open Font Format; (candidate recommendation; use application/x-font-woff until standard is official)

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.AudioXMsWax
member.summary: Windows Media Audio Redirector; Documented in Microsoft help page

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.AudioXMsWma
member.summary: Windows Media Audio; Documented in Microsoft KB 288102

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.VideoXMsWmv
member.summary: Windows Media Video; Documented in Microsoft KB 288102

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ModelVrml
member.summary: WRL files, VRML files; Defined in RFC 2077

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ModelX3DXml
member.summary: X3D ISO standard for representing 3D computer graphics, X3D XML files

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ModelX3DBinary
member.summary: X3D ISO standard for representing 3D computer graphics, X3DB binary files

member.name: F:ZLJ.Net.MimeTypes.MimeTypeNames.ModelX3DVrml
member.summary: X3D ISO standard for representing 3D computer graphics, X3DV VRML files

member.name: T:ZLJ.ZLJAppServiceBase
member.summary: Derive your application services from this class.
